ggcheck 0.0.5
  • Reference
  • Changelog

ggcheck: Inspect 'ggplot2' Plots for Automated Grading in Learning Exercises

Source: R/ggcheck-package.R
ggcheck-package.Rd

'ggcheck' provides functions that inspect 'ggplot2' objects to make it easier for teachers to check that student plots meet expectations. Designed primarily for automated grading via 'gradethis' in interactive 'learnr' tutorials.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/rstudio/ggcheck

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/rstudio/ggcheck/issues

On this page

ggcheck is built for use with learnr interactive tutorials.

learnr is a part of the R Markdown ecosystem of packages for creating computational documents in R. Learn more at rmarkdown.rstudio.com.

Developed by Garrick Aden-Buie, Garrett Grolemund, Nischal Shrestha, .

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
